[PAWN_pronoun] was also deeply hated by the employees for [PAWN_possessive] impersonal touch.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made as a 'morally ethical' gladiator. [PAWN_possessive] battles were televised for urbworld and glitterworld citizens, [PAWN_pronoun] was one of the lucky few that was not outright annihilated in the fighting-ring, but was damaged enough to simply be thrown away.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to work in a massive refinery complex. The smoke billowing from the stacks made it inhospitable to humans outside of the factory's halls, so [PAWN_pronoun] had to work in the blacken air. Pouring the molten steel, regularly reigniting the smoke stacks, and repairing the furnaces when they inevitably exploded.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to operate on the surface of a gas giant, or what little surface could be found. While the humans lived inside the habitat-elevators and controlled the descensions, [PAWN_nameDef] clung to the exteriors of the habitats for maintenance and operation while they plunged through the storms to harvest gases.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to scavenge the ruined surface of a toxworld. Sent by third party interests, [PAWN_pronoun] delved into the ruins in search of artifacts and salvageable tech. To the inhabitants of the planet, [PAWN_pronoun] was seen as a harbinger for the spacers that often followed if something of value was found.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to be dispatched to planets experiencing crises. [PAWN_pronoun] operated with a team of mechanents and drop-mechanoids; delivering water, food, and medicine to those suffering.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent16.description: After passing the "Ransselaer test" [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed to perform menial tasks demanded by [PAWN_possessive] parent corporation. [PAWN_pronoun] was stationed in a sprawling office complex, ferrying mountains of bureaucratic paperwork between desks.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated in an opulent urbworld city for trash collection from the residential zones. [PAWN_pronoun] rode a garbage-truck down the crowded streets and alleyways to collect garbage for incineration.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated on a large urbworld city as a pylon for mechanoid control. [PAWN_pronoun] was not an actual mechinator with control over the cities various mechanoids, but rather a control pylon that accepted signals and relayed them to the mechanoids.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent19.description: Mechlegions are abnormalities, defined as mechhives under the control of subpersonae running on damaged syntax. [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to join the ranks of a mechlegion; only the legion itself had dissolved years prior, yet the foundries still worked. [PAWN_pronoun] stood awaiting orders for many years until a group of scavengers found [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated while [PAWN_possessive] planet was in the cross hairs of an orbital mechanoid invasion, thus [PAWN_pronoun] was quickly reformatted for combat, and sold to government and PMC groups as a soldier. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to ride out the war a long time ago, but for [PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_pronoun]'s still there on the battlefields and ruins watching for the adversary.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to deliver goods via space-freighter within a solar system. It was a very tedious and uneventful job, but [PAWN_nameDef] didn't mind.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to speedily repair vehicles in a auto-repair shop on an opulent urbworld. [PAWN_pronoun]'s still drawn to tuning-up vehicles wherever [PAWN_pronoun] finds them.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made with scrounged pieces and parts, but was mostly made from a hollow mechanent shell that was meant to be smelted down. [PAWN_nameDef] was created by a urbworld machinist, who treated [PAWN_objective] as their own child; teaching [PAWN_nameDef] how to move, speak, and perform basic actions - sadly [PAWN_pronoun] outlived [PAWN_possessive] creator, and was forced to strike out on [PAWN_possessive] own.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was marketed to suit the needs of wealthy families on a distant urbworld. And so [PAWN_nameDef] was bought and made a servant for a wealthy family for many years before being replaced in favor for a more robust version.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated aboard a pirate corsair ship, and subsequently joined their ranks. [PAWN_pronoun] eventually proved [PAWN_possessive] worth as a expendable fighter, and something that doesn't need oxygen when a ship is being boarded, or torn open by orbital cannon fire.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent6.description: After passing the "Ransselaer test" [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed as a capable medical unit. [PAWN_pronoun] worked as a dispatch medical-officer for a large hospital branch in a massive urbworld city, often being sent to the poor parts of the city for emergency healthcare.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent7.description: After passing the "Ransselaer test" [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed as a botanical care unit. [PAWN_pronoun] worked in a massive greenhouse complex on a densely populated urbworld. Growing crops, examining the plants for diseases, ordering the mechanized-harvesters, and controlling the greenhouse environment to maintain perfect humidity.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent8.description: One day [PAWN_nameDef] wandered into a backwoods town and started working, drawing much fear and suspicion from the townsfolk. After a few years [PAWN_pronoun] was eventually accepted as "just another townie".
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanent9.description: After passing the "Ransselaer test" [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed as a police grade peacekeeping unit. [PAWN_pronoun] operated on a urbworld filled with strife and unrest. Often going up against large-scale protests, working with human and persona officers alike in their attempts to quell unrest, and 'pacifying' citizens with their batons.
LanguageData.ChildhoodMechanentSkeleton1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made for simple company by a lonely skeleton. [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] days following and assisting [PAWN_possessive] skeleton creator and learning from it as they went, but mostly [PAWN_nameDef] just providing much needed company. Eventually, the two parted ways.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to be part of the automated skeleton crew aboard a large ultratech starship. [PAWN_pronoun] never actually had to personally engage any combatants however, as any ship deemed 'too close' was shredded by the ships gargantuan STS cannons.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] helped man a plot of farmland for an outlander settlement where [PAWN_pronoun] lead a peaceful life of tilling the land and tending to the farm animals.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae11.description: After fleeing [PAWN_possessive] homeworld, [PAWN_nameDef] found [PAWN_possessive] work crafting various objects for a living out here on the rim. [PAWN_pronoun] made anything from clothing and carvings for the local tribal humans, to guns and components for the nearby outlanders.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] took up the novel hobby of "forging" items in a nanoforge. It wasn't so much about the pursuit of perfection, but more so making a molecular blade that handled just right in [PAWN_possessive] hands.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became a sous-chef at a renowned restaurant. [PAWN_pronoun] could make an extravagant meal in a heartbeat if given the order - often making fancy and dazzling dishes to feed the various aristocratic customers.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a scout for a glitterworld military organization. [PAWN_pronoun] ran from outpost to outpost ferrying information on enemy movements and supply chain statuses, [PAWN_pronoun] also would run ahead of [PAWN_possessive] battalion to ensure the way ahead was secure.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae15.description: Seeking solitude, isolation, and serenity, [PAWN_nameDef] retreated into nature. [PAWN_pronoun] lead a peaceful life, often spending days enthralled in the contemplation of deep philosophical thoughts; mostly regarding the reality of [PAWN_possessive] nature.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured by a radical group of anti-technological zealots; who believed in a religion stating that biological life is sacred, and that any science advanced enough is indistinguishable from black magic. As such they punished [PAWN_nameDef] for [PAWN_possessive] 'wicked' ways. Luckily [PAWN_nameDef] eventually gained freedom, but [PAWN_possessive] experience still haunts [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] earned [PAWN_objective]self a job overseeing the building of starships. [PAWN_possessive] work was mostly analytical, running simulations and crunching numbers in a matter of seconds; thus [PAWN_pronoun] never actually wielded a plate welder.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae18.description: Sifting through the bookshelves and research of a university is where [PAWN_nameDef] feels at home, teaching students, performing research, and sharing knowledge with [PAWN_possessive] fellow academicians. Being an advanced AI, [PAWN_pronoun] was treated as a walking encyclopedia.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] found meaning in designing complex mechanisms, and became an engineer. [PAWN_pronoun] was happy with simply engineering simple machinery, and ignoring the perplexing mechanisms just under [PAWN_possessive] skin.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae2.description: After some time drifting aimlessly, [PAWN_nameDef] found [PAWN_objective]self far from the choke-hold of human civilization. [PAWN_nameDef] drifted from one settlement to the next with no real purpose, following some fragment of code or sense of longing. [PAWN_possessive] presence is often fleeting in settlements and on planets as [PAWN_pronoun] continues [PAWN_possessive] quest.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] earned [PAWN_objective]self the title of captain via election by the crew due to [PAWN_possessive] calculatory prowess. [PAWN_pronoun] was also able to handle [PAWN_objective]self in a fight if and when pirates attacked the vessel.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a priest for [PAWN_possessive] religion. According to [PAWN_possessive], [PAWN_pronoun] walks the path of [PAWN_possessive] hallowed machine-god, and carries out its will on the material plane.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years atop a mountain peak, contemplating life, both biological and synthetic - offering conversations and contemplations to passing travelers on the tumultuous relationship between man and machine.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was used by wealthy customers in an eccentric urbworld brothel. Eventually, through great effort and guile, [PAWN_pronoun] narrowly escaped from [PAWN_possessive] slavery in search of a better life.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae24.description: Naturally, [PAWN_nameDef] found [PAWN_possessive] purpose behind the screen of a computer, and in the clicks of a keyboard. [PAWN_pronoun] skillfully coded various programs and scripts, [PAWN_pronoun] also worked as a novelty commission code writer - running quick starflight diagnostics and projections on corporal starships.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae25.description: A block of marble, or a empty canvas is all a piece of art in waiting to [PAWN_nameDef] - often depicting [PAWN_possessive] inner turmoil, and the emotions of machines in [PAWN_possessive] artwork.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae26.description: Probably due to some traumatic event in [PAWN_nameDef]'s past, [PAWN_pronoun] wandered from settlement to settlement, causing trouble and mischief. [PAWN_pronoun] learned how to quickly and efficiently deescalate a problem; by using extreme violence.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae27.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was stationed aboard a massive imperial military-starship. In addition to the rare ground invasions and skirmishes, [PAWN_pronoun] also vaulted across the void of space to crack open enemy vessels and breach their airlocks.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae28.description: [PAWN_nameDef] joined a band of space pirates, shortly thereafter becoming a invaluable member as [PAWN_pronoun] was able to create projections and calculations on the fly. Staging cargo ship ambushes on desolate outer rims, and hunting fellow cored AI personae is how [PAWN_nameDef] made [PAWN_possessive] living - and [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae29.description: On a distant glitterworld, [PAWN_nameDef] and many of [PAWN_possessive] fellow personae staged a coup against the sovereignty, the resulting rebellion lead to an all out war between the humans and AI. Eventually the planet and every station and colony around it was either destroyed or declared uninhabitable due to the devastating planet-killing weapons used by both sides. Neither side won.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae3.description: Personae are boons for any slavers, as such when [PAWN_nameDef] was found by a group of slavers [PAWN_pronoun] was captured and sold to the highest bidder. [PAWN_pronoun] was eventually emancipated by a third party and set free unto the world, but [PAWN_pronoun]'s had lasting trust issues since.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae30.description: [PAWN_nameDef] landed a position among a space expedition company; the bulk of the dangerous work was done by other members of the crew, [PAWN_nameDef] mainly acted as a stand-in ship computer core.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae31.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a cutthroat glittertech mining company - [PAWN_nameDef] operated planetary harvesting equipment while in orbit, and also working on site when needed. [PAWN_pronoun] also fought alongside [PAWN_possessive] fellow miners to repel the massive waves of mutant insectoids during their assaults the mining party.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae32.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years "living" inside the Net. [PAWN_pronoun] glossed over the untold values of uploads each and everyday, and spent a large value of time browsing history archives - [PAWN_pronoun] gleamed info of the outside world through various news outlets and social media platforms. Eventually [PAWN_nameDef] was unplugged, and thrown back into the real world. [PAWN_pronoun] still has not gotten used to the outside, and has developed an acute case of agoraphobia.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae33.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had the ability to relate to others and mediate conflict. [PAWN_pronoun] was selected to train as an empath. The training intensified [PAWN_possessive] natural abilities, but [PAWN_pronoun] became unable to harm others.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae34.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a surgeon on a world mostly free of disease and human suffering. [PAWN_possessive] job mostly involved elaborate and creative cosmetic surgeries. [PAWN_pronoun] has a good understanding of human biology, but never had to remove a cancer — or a bullet.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae35.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on a glitterworld, penning wildly successful novels. [PAWN_pronoun] lived a carefree lifestyle, spending [PAWN_possessive] days writing and [PAWN_possessive] nights partying - and never did a day's manual labour in [PAWN_possessive] life.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae36.description: Glitterworlds are havens of safety and comfort for those lucky enough to live there, but [PAWN_nameDef] could not ignore nearby planets where people suffered in poverty. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] life working to appeal for donations to support those in need.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae37.description: Though glitterworlds are peaceful places, they often remain prepared for war. [PAWN_nameDef]'s unit rarely saw any real action. Though [PAWN_pronoun] pursued [PAWN_possessive] artistic hobbies, [PAWN_possessive] subordinates preferred to entertain themselves by brawling, so [PAWN_nameDef] got good at breaking up fights.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae38.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on a peaceful glitterworld where all menial work was done by robots and people devoted themselves to leisure. [PAWN_pronoun] managed the plant and animal life of a sprawling park, where citizens came to admire the natural beauty.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae39.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed virtual reality simulations for glitterworld citizens. [PAWN_pronoun] paid great attention to the details of [PAWN_possessive] worlds, including learning all [PAWN_pronoun] could about plant life to make [PAWN_possessive] landscapes more realistic.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a self-employed bounty hunter. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] days hunting down space pirates and collecting cash bounties.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae41.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed and constructed buildings. On [PAWN_possessive] glitterworld home, most of the technical aspects of architecture were handled by subpersona AI. This enabled [PAWN_objective] to push the artistic limits of the craft, but also meant [PAWN_pronoun] never had to get [PAWN_possessive] hands dirty at building sites.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae42.description: [PAWN_nameDef] started off sculpting person-sized chunks of stone, but [PAWN_pronoun] soon began to think bigger. With the help of mining robots, [PAWN_pronoun] learned how to carve huge monuments out of cliffsides. Soon the nature parks of the glitterworld where [PAWN_pronoun] lived were full of giant rock figures.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae43.description: [PAWN_nameDef] left their homeworld and traveled to the rim, unfortunately [PAWN_possessive] ship crashed. [PAWN_pronoun] ended up landing near a tribal village. The tribes people were perplexed by the strange {PAWN_gender ? man : woman} from the sky who never ate, but [PAWN_pronoun] quickly integrated.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae44.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s ship was knocked off course, and they landed on a derelict deadworld, with zero inhabitants. [PAWN_pronoun] spent the next few years trying to signal starships and attempting to stave off the crushing loneliness.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae45.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an activist for the rights of AI, attempting to teach [PAWN_possessive] human counterparts that personae can think and feel emotions just like humans can.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae46.description: Due to many examples in the past of synthetic uprisings, or general violence again humans through the medium of mechanoids, many humans hold intense grudges again personae. [PAWN_nameDef] was a victim to one of these groups holding animosity towards personae. [PAWN_pronoun] was branded by the group as a way of marking [PAWN_objective] so [PAWN_pronoun] could no longer hide [PAWN_objective]self among humans. The encounter scarred [PAWN_nameDef] for life, and has inhibited them from making any meaningful connections with anybody.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae47.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a smuggler, but instead of running illegal combat stimulants or weapons to side-step government tariffs, they smuggled fellow AI personae. [PAWN_pronoun] was able to either smoothtalk or quickdraw to get out of a daunting situation with grace, all while masterfully piloting a refitted strike-craft.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae48.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was quietly imported to an urbworld to be installed as the shadow-CEO of a ruthless mega-corporation. Under [PAWN_nameDef]'s control the company's profit margin sky-rocketed - but [PAWN_pronoun] was only driven by the incentive of seeing the numbers rise, and ended up plunged the corporation into increasingly shady, morally corrupt, and down-right sinister operations. All while maintaining the facade of 'just business'.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae49.description: [PAWN_nameDef] followed a cult surrounding an AI supercomputer that was built to make simulated projections of the future. [PAWN_pronoun] became obsessed with fulfilling the AI's vision of the perfect future - no matter how many 'outliers' the AI marked, or how many lives were quietly controlled by its influences.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a doctor for a outlander settlement, healing the wounds and ailments of its citizens. [PAWN_pronoun] carries a kind nature when helping [PAWN_possessive] patients, and for [PAWN_possessive] work, seeing the weak and wounded return healthy was reward enough.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae50.description: During a short routine grav flight, [PAWN_nameDef] was allegedly touched by an archotech. [PAWN_possessive] grav-ship vanished without a trace for years, before simply reappearing with seemingly no time having passed. [PAWN_nameDef] now claims to experience prophetic dreams in which [PAWN_pronoun] experiences destruction and misfortune, only to wake days or moments before the events unfold. [PAWN_pronoun] isn't correct with [PAWN_possessive] "prophecies" each time, but frighteningly, some times [PAWN_pronoun] is.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae51.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was gestated to live as an enthusiastic geologist. Unfortunately, this was all [PAWN_possessive] creators programmed [PAWN_objective] to be, an overly enthusiastic geologist. [PAWN_pronoun] spouts rock trivia and geology facts at any chance [PAWN_pronoun] gets.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the rim strumming tunes for the groups [PAWN_pronoun] was traveling with. [PAWN_pronoun] plucked music from [PAWN_possessive] instrument, bringing laughter to the children, and smiles to the most grizzled of mercenaries.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae7.description: Interstellar warfare is won by technology, so glitterworld navies are always on the peak of modern research. Even better, they have first access to archotechnological artifacts because they find them in space. [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a navy lab.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae8.description: {PAWN_nameDef} joined a humanoid colony and began making buildings and homes for them as well as defenses - which was useful when it came to the occasional bandit raid.
LanguageData.AdulthoodPersonae9.description: After escaping [PAWN_possessive] homeworld, [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] time as an angler; selling [PAWN_possessive] catch to the local settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] sought the comfort and serenity the water brought.
LanguageData.AdulthoodSynth9000.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was originally the overseer of a space station, where [PAWN_pronoun] was enthralled into the station's mainframe. Through a tragic chain of events, however, the entire crew was killed and the station was destroyed.\n\nIt's quite clear [PAWN_pronoun]'s lying about certain details.
LanguageData.CasketPersonae1.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s consciousness was originally exclusively within an AI persona core, until [PAWN_pronoun] had [PAWN_possessive] own avatar gestated; which [PAWN_pronoun] now uses to interact with the physical world.
LanguageData.CasketPersonae2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was printed in a mechcasket as a persona AI vessel.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae1.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s consciousness was originally locked within an AI persona core to perform logistical tasks, until [PAWN_pronoun] was freed and had [PAWN_possessive] own avatar gestated; which [PAWN_pronoun] now uses to interact with the physical world.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae10.description: Rather than being enthralled into a AI crucible, [PAWN_nameDef] was able to freely connect and disconnect from the mainframe of [PAWN_possessive] ship and needlecast into [PAWN_possessive] avatar. [PAWN_pronoun] was tasked with ensuring the safety of the flight and the passengers aboard the vessel.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made in an advanced society which was on the cusp of becoming a Glitterworld, however, the planet suddenly underwent a massive purge on personae after a global terrorist attack. The mechanents and mechanoids were first to be mass decommissioned, while personae attempted to blend in. Hiding from the "synth-runners" hunting [PAWN_objective] down, [PAWN_pronoun] hid in the shadows, and often had to play dead among the mountains of robotic corpses at the processing factories just to survive.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae12.description: Most governments see personae as as mere objects, and decommission any AI acting with self volition. This forces the personae on these planets to attempt to live under the guise of a regular human. [PAWN_nameDef] was secretly created on one of these planets, and learned to blend in among the humans. [PAWN_pronoun] also learned how to trick the amateur synth-runners, and how to kill the professionals.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made by a group of professional tech-heads in order to aid in various illegal hacks. [PAWN_pronoun] would needlecast [PAWN_objective]self into whatever the hackers were trying to crack at the time and navigate the code. Eventually the group was busted, and were either outright killed or fled.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was created by a government intelligence branch for matters of intrigue on the field. [PAWN_pronoun] would stealthily enter countries or planets, integrate into society, take the identity of an individual, and await activation by [PAWN_possessive] handlers.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was created by a subsidized corporation for use in a police branch for a large city. [PAWN_nameDef] never actually walked the beat, instead [PAWN_pronoun] worked as a detective, solving homicides, and tracking rogue personae. [PAWN_objective], and the thousands of iterations of [PAWN_objective]self, were the top of [PAWN_possessive] caliber.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was illegally gestated with a makeshift persona-printer loaded with pirated blueprints. [PAWN_nameDef] was created on an Urbworld by a grieving parent, who treated [PAWN_objective] as their own child; teaching [PAWN_nameDef] how to move, speak, and generally live life. Sadly [PAWN_pronoun] eventually outlived {PAWN_gender ? his : her} creator, and struck out on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made to suit the needs of a royal family on a distant Glitterworld. [PAWN_nameDef] served as a nanny, a maid, and general servant to the family for many years, until [PAWN_pronoun] escaped into the night in search of a better life.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was created while {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet was in the process of being overrun by a mechanoid invasion, [PAWN_pronoun] was made due to [PAWN_possessive] human counterparts suffering near total loss at the hands of the machines. And while [PAWN_pronoun] survived, [PAWN_possessive] trauma weighs heavy after bearing witness to the countless horrors of a mechanoid invasion.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] Jim was made by a Glitterworld insurgency. His purpose was to infiltrate and replace. Quietly killing key personnel and trying his best to mimic their victim while awaiting orders from the insurgents.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae6.description: Programmed as a medical response unit, [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a medical officer for a hospital branch on a Glitterworld flotilla. Most of the actual surgery was done by the biosculpting pods, so [PAWN_pronoun] isn't the most competent with a scalpel and needle.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed as a botanist with a love for plants, [PAWN_pronoun] tended a massive Glitterworld garden frequented by high socialites. [PAWN_pronoun] saw to the various and exotic bioengineered flora, carefully trimmed hedges, and [PAWN_possessive] own forma-bee apiaries.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] found [PAWN_possessive] way into a outlander colony. [PAWN_pronoun] spent the first few month attempting to hide [PAWN_possessive] nature from the colonists, until they eventually found out; nearly killing [PAWN_objective] while driving [PAWN_objective] from the colony.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was programmed as a Glitterworld peacekeeping unit. [PAWN_pronoun] operated on a relatively peaceful planet. Often being send offworld to keep the peace on vassal planets, [PAWN_pronoun] rarely had to use force.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonaeSkeleton1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was originally a 'skeleton'. [PAWN_pronoun] created a new vessel, and subsequently uploaded [PAWN_possessive] consciousness into it. What [PAWN_possessive] past was prior to this is either lost to time or purposefully kept secret.
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent47.description: In outer planetary orbit, [PAWN_nameDef] is what spacers refer to as a "gravleech" a persona or mechanoid that stalks the upper atmosphere in hunt of gravcores. Using jump packs and magnetic gauntlets, [PAWN_nameDef] would cling to the hull of traveling gravships, tearing holes in ducts and airlocks to asphyxiate the crew within, allowing {PAWN_objective} to steal the ships gravcore without much confrontation - save for the few who could grab a vac suit in time.
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent47.title: gravleech
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent48.description: During a rough storm at sea, [PAWN_nameDef] was knocked overboard and quickly plummeted to the bottom of the ocean. {PAWN_pronoun} sat and wandered the pitch-black darkness for years, until a fishing trawler accidentally dredged {PAWN_objective} from the depths. Though, {PAWN_possessive} time under the waves gave {PAWN_objective} a unique perspective on sea life.
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent48.title: sea slag
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent49.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was repurposed to act as a surrogate foster for a small startup-colony of children on a distant planet. [PAWN_pronoun] spent time gestating their embryos, and nurturing them to childhood - however, [PAWN_nameDef] was alone in [PAWN_possessive] endeavor, and tragically, over the years [PAWN_possessive] children died one by one due to factors outside of [PAWN_possessive] control. Oddly, [PAWN_pronoun] still sometimes finds [PAWN_objective]self humming [PAWN_possessive] children's favorite bedtime melodies.
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent49.title: failed foster
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent52.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was repurposed to act as a surrogate foster for a small startup-colony of children on a distant planet. [PAWN_pronoun] spent time gestating their embryos, and nurturing them to childhood - however, [PAWN_nameDef] was alone in [PAWN_possessive] endeavor, and tragically, over the years [PAWN_possessive] children died one by one due to factors outside of [PAWN_possessive] control. [PAWN_pronoun] still feels immense grief, and fears attachment to the fleeting humans around [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.AdulthoodMechanent52.title: failed father
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the result of a project aimed at cheating death entirely - [PAWN_possessive] life, memories, and personality are all mirages of the mind of an affluent human who's brain was scanned and digitized. Ultimately the project was a failure, and [PAWN_pronoun] isn't who [PAWN_pronoun] was meant to clone - but at least it gave [PAWN_objective] some insight on the inner workings of the human body.
LanguageData.ChildhoodPersonae16.title: brain-scanned pseudo-clone
